info.description: Two-column layout: media (image or video) on one side, content (text or quote) on the other.

layoutType.description: Controls which fields to fill in. Image + Text: fill image and content. Image + Quote: fill image and quote. Video + Text: fill videoUrl and content. Video + Quote: fill videoUrl and quote.

imagePosition.description: Which side the image appears on.

displayRatio.description: Content-to-media column ratio. 1:1 equal columns; 2:1 wider content; 1:2 wider media.

image.description: Image for the media column. Leave empty when using a video instead.

imageAlt.description: Alt text for the image. Leave blank if the image is decorative.

videoUrl.description: YouTube or Vimeo URL for the media column. Takes precedence over image when both are set.

content.description: Rich text for the content column. Leave empty when using a quote instead.

quote.description: Quote for the content column. When set, renders as a blockquote instead of rich text.
